documentation.description: This type can be extended to match any required context

simple_types.name: Master_States
simple_types.code: type Master_States is (Waiting_Worker, Waiting_Deadline, Executing, Idle, Ready);

tagged_types.name: Context_type
tagged_types.code: type Context_type is tagged null record;

access_types.name: Action_Procedure
access_types.code: type Action_Procedure is access procedure (Context : Context_Type'Class);
